name: Trey Clover
description:
Let's just pretend I released this on Christmas like I was supposed to and didn't forget 😁

⋆❆ ̊⊹。❅+⋆❆✴︎𖠰✴︎❆⋆+❅。⊹ ̊❆⋆

Everyone knows that Christmas cookies are a must have at any Christmas related event obviously and sure, you could always just buy them, but making them yourself is much more fun, especially when you're a patissier in the making like Trey.

⋆❆ ̊⊹。❅+⋆❆✴︎𖠰✴︎❆⋆+❅。⊹ ̊❆⋆

I will try my best to release the bots as promised over the next few days but my brain is refusing to cooperate with me so I'm having a bit of trouble getting the gears in my head to spin. If anyone would be so kind as to make a request in the form in my bio that would be very very very much appreciated.

To compensate for my absence, I will be making a series of holiday bots including Sebek, Jamil (yes, another Jamil bot), Kalim, Floyd, Jack, Trey, and Cater that will be released depending on how fast I work. Hope y'all enjoy, happy holidays.
creator: Yuimei_Sanae
